overview.what: A classic beginner project that covers the fundamentals of React state management and component structure. You'll build a functional Todo application where users can add, toggle, and delete tasks.
overview.how_it_works: The application uses React's useState hook to manage an array of todo items. Each item is an object with a unique ID, text, and completion status. The UI re-renders automatically whenever the state is updated.
what_you_learn: Managing complex state arrays in React

files.description: The main component managing the todo state and layout.
